{#- Breadcrumbs / section banner. Currently used only by the blog sub-site to render a "Blog" banner at the top of every blog page, so the visitor knows they're in the blog area. Other pages render nothing here. -#} {%- if ablog is defined %} {%- set in_blog = pagename == ablog.blog_path or pagename.startswith(ablog.blog_path ~ '/') %} {%- if in_blog %}
Blog
Releases, deep dives, war stories
RSS
{%- endif %} {%- endif %}
